title: Incredibly Crispy German Seafood Fritters
description: A yeasty, crispy, and light German dish featuring frozen seafood mix, nuka-pickle, and satvik-friendly ingredients, perfect for a snack or dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and lemon juice.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Fold in the thawed seafood mix and chopped nuka-pickle.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil, about 1/4 cup each.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Serve the fritters hot and enjoy.
